reviews.comment:
Estaba todo bien
No nos limpiaron el vidrio ni nos ofrecieron elementos para hacerlo nosotros.
Es un servicio esencial en la ruta!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine.
They didn't clean our windshield or offer us anything to do it ourselves.
It's an essential service on the road!

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicios tiene los servicios básicos de YPF, es pequeña pero efectiva para cargar nafta de la marca. El personal es amable pero por momentos demoran mucho en atenderte inclusive cuando no hay nadie y los ves por ahí. Aún así voy frecuentemente porque me resulta práctica

(Translated by Google)
The gas station offers basic YPF services; it's small but efficient for filling up with that brand of gasoline. The staff is friendly, but sometimes they take a long time to serve you, even when there's no one around and you can see them nearby. Even so, I go there frequently because it's convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQdGVMWElnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio para repostar combustible y comer algo sabroso del otro lado de la ruta, donde se sirve cabrito asado. Es un parador cuyas mesas están  hechas con durmientes de ferrocarril y se sirven abundantes porciones de cabrito al horno de barro o a la estaca, a precios accesibles

(Translated by Google)
A good service station to refuel and grab a tasty bite across the road, where they serve roast kid goat. It's a roadside inn with tables made from railroad ties, serving generous portions of kid goat cooked in a clay oven or on a spit, at reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMmJEbGtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad no entiendo como no hacen factura A para cargar combustible. Es la única estación de servicio que no lo hacen. Cargo solamente cuando necesito llegar a destino, y solamente unos pesos. Sino, directamente no paro. Preguntas a los playeros y te dicen solamente factura B

(Translated by Google)
I honestly don't understand why they don't issue an A-ticket for fuel. It's the only gas station that doesn't. I only fill up when I need to get to my destination, and only a few pesos. Otherwise, I just don't stop. You ask the gas station attendants, and they only tell you B-ticket.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQNHN5bkVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cargamos 78 lts de infinia diesel y le pedimos permiso al playero para pasar la noche detrás de la estación con nuestra casita rodante, ( sector que no está  muy limpio pero zafa) decidimos ir a tomar algo en el servi , le pregunto al muchacho que  atendía: qué  tenes para celíacos? Y me responde muy fresco NADA. Entonces armando me de paciencia le digo: podemos  tomar acá  el café  y traernos lo que vamos a comer de la casa rodante? Y sin dudarlo un segundo  me responde: NO SE PUEDEN INGRESAR COMESTIBLES AL ESTABLECIMIENTO. Pero si no tenes...le digo y me vuelve a repetir lo mismo. La cosa terminó  ahí  porque  necesitábamos quedarnos a pasar la noche allí ( aunque  no lo recomiendo  porque  es un lugar  super ruidoso ). Pero le comunico al dueño  de la estación  de servicio tres cosas: que el empleado que estaba el jueves 7 de noviembre  por la tarde es un maleducado  y que es obligatorio  tener algunas opciones sin tacc para los celíacos.  De paso le informo( por si no lo sabe) que viajamos 3800 km en estos días y su combustible  fue el más caro de todo el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with 78 liters of Infinia diesel and asked the attendant for permission to spend the night behind the station with our camper van (the area isn't very clean, but it's passable). We decided to get something to eat at the service station, and I asked the young man working there, "What do you have for celiacs?" He replied very casually, "NOTHING." So, mustering my patience, I said, "Can we have our coffee here and bring our food from the camper van?" Without hesitating for a second, he replied, "NO FOOD IS ALLOWED ON THE PREMISES." "But you don't have any..." I said, and he repeated the same thing. That was the end of it because we needed to stay overnight (although I don't recommend it because it's a very noisy place). But I told the owner of the service station three things: that the employee who was working on Thursday, November 7th, in the afternoon was rude, and that it's mandatory to have some gluten-free options for celiacs. By the way, I'm letting you know (in case you didn't know) that we traveled 3800 km these past few days and your fuel was the most expensive of the whole trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMzbzd6NEl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta en el medio de un desierto.  Parada obligatoria porque no tenes otra cosa en kilómetros.  Bastante completa y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
It's in the middle of a desert. A must-stop because there's nothing else for miles around. Quite well-equipped and the service is good.
